1-3.name: Low Intelligence
1-3.characteristics: Aggressive, exposes position, charges directly, poor situational awareness

4-6.name: Medium Intelligence
4-6.characteristics: Balanced tactics, moderate caution, basic positioning

7-8.name: High Intelligence
7-8.characteristics: Position-aware, uses cover, flanking attempts, tactical retreats

9-10.name: Elite Intelligence
9-10.characteristics: Sniper tactics, extreme caution, optimal positioning, ambush specialist

exposure_penalty.description: Higher intelligence units avoid open positions and seek cover

flanking_bonus.description: Units with intelligence >= 7 attempt flanking maneuvers

stealth_threshold.description: Intelligence needed to use stealth approach

retreat_threshold.description: Intelligence needed to retreat when losing
